findings.description: The first structural diagram (nablarch_structure.png) showing the dependency relationships between the three NAF module groups and business components is not referenced in s1. The source text explicitly introduces this figure: 「以下の図は、これらのモジュール群および、業務ロジックを実装する業務コンポーネントの依存関係を表した図である。」 Note that s2 does include the second figure (nablarch_structure2.png) in the same pattern, making the omission in s1 inconsistent.
findings.source_evidence: Source: `.. figure:: _image/nablarch_structure.png` with caption `**NAF構成図**` under the NAFの構成 section. Knowledge file s2 includes `![NAF構成図（実装範囲）](assets/about-nablarch-overview_of_NAF--s1/nablarch_structure2.png)` but s1 has no corresponding image reference.
